baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Overall lack of relevance to scenario context; inconsistent and unnatural persona response for the given situation. Overall low-quality rating due to poor alignment with all three criteria.

The response is highly consistent with the persona and context, providing a natural reply that aligns well with merchant characteristics of practicality and adherence to rules. The tone could be slightly more engaging for higher quality ratings.
